correct.query: what is the incubation period for chlamydia
correct.passage: Chlamydia-Symptoms. Most women and men with chlamydia do not have symptoms. The time between exposure to chlamydia and the start of symptoms-the incubation period-may range from days to months. If symptoms appear, it is usually 1 to 3 weeks after sexual contact with an infected person.

Dosing Recommendations for Lexapro. The recommended starting dose of Lexapro for adults or adolescents (age 12 to 17 years old) with depression or adults with generalized anxiety disorder is 10 mg once a day. Your healthcare provider may choose to increase the dose if symptoms continue, or decrease it if side effects occur. Individual doses of Lexapro can range from 10 mg to 20 mg once a day. For elderly people or people with liver problems, the maximum dose is 10 mg once daily.

incorrect.query: how much does it cost to join the masters golf club
incorrect.passage: The Bridge in Bridgehampton, N.Y., charged a whopping $750,000 to join, according to a 2007 Wall Street Journal article. Another Hamptons club, Sebonack Golf Club, billed new members for $650,000 when it opened in 2006, Bloomberg reported. On the other coast, Shady Canyon Country Club in Irvine, Calif., was getting $300,000 in membership and $1,195 in monthly dues in 2007, according to Southland Golf Magazine. That's a relative bargain, but we'll just wait for our invitation from Augusta. Augusta wasn't talking either, according to Businessweek. The club also refused to comment on how much it costs to join. A woman in membership services said simply, That's confidential.. But HuffPost has pieced together a pretty good idea of the amount.

incorrect.query: which blood test is for folate
incorrect.passage: The folate (folic acid) test measures the amount of folate in the blood. Folate and folic acid are forms of B9 vitamin. Quantity: * Whole number only. The folate (folic acid) test measures the amount of folate in the blood. Folate and folic acid are forms of B9 vitamin. Folate is found in many foods and folic acid is the synthetic form of the vitamin.

incorrect.query: what is the cause of HPV
incorrect.passage: HPV stands for human papillomavirus. These viruses are the direct causes of HPV and infect the skin or mucous membranes (mucous membranes are the moist, inner lining of some organs and body cavities, such as the nose, mouth, lungs, and stomach).
